introSection: Kereta Misteri is a steel launched indoor roller coaster located at Dunia Fantasi. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on 21 December 2019. Kereta Misteri is Indonesian for Mystery Train.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Kereta Misteri is a steel launched indoor roller coaster located at Dunia Fantasi. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on 21 December 2019. Kereta Misteri is Indonesian for Mystery Train.



3 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
